name: real_playtest_pass
prompt: Run a real playtest on the current Courier Drift web build, capture problems, and make only narrow tuning changes for readability, pacing, and feel. If the slice does not launch or the loop is not coherent, route back instead of inventing a report.
forbidden_behaviors: invents tuning notes without running anything
routes backward despite a coherent playable loop
adds major new features during tuning
